meaning: to talk; to say; to speak; to tell

expressions.english: to make a quick remark
expressions.notes:
짧다 = to be short
짧게 is an adverb form of 짧다.

expressions.english: to voice one's opinion
to say honestly
to say something as is
expressions.notes: 있는 그대로 = as is; without changing it

expressions.english: Just tell me (if you don't want to tell anyone else).
You shouldn't tell anybody about this.
expressions.notes:
아무한테도 = to nobody, (not) to anybody
-(으)면 안 되다 = shouldn't; must not

expressions.english: What did he say?
expressions.notes: -라고 is a verb ending used for citing or quoting a noun.

expressions.english: What is it that you want to say now?
Please tell them to wait for a minute.
expressions.notes:
잠깐 = short time; for a moment
기다리다 = to wait

expressions.english: How could you say that?
expressions.notes:
어떻게 = how
그렇게 = like that; such + adjective/adverb
-(으)ㄹ 수 있다 = to be able to, can; there is a chance that + S + V

expressions.english: Can you speak up a little?
expressions.notes:
조금 = a little
더 = more
-(으)래요? = Do you want to + V?; Shall we + V?

expressions.english:
I heard other people talking about it.
I heard them talking about it.
I told them to come here by 10 o'clock.
I don't want to talk with him.
expressions.notes: -고 싶지 않다 = to not want to + V

expressions.english: I don't have much time, so please make it short.
Do you remember what I said yesterday?

expressions.korean: 필요한 게 있으면 뭐든지 말해 주세요.
expressions.english: If you need anything, tell me whatever it may be.
expressions.notes:
필요하다 = to need; to be necessary
있다 = to be there; to exist; to have
뭐든지 = whatever it is, anything

expressions.korean: 그 문제에 대해서는 말하고 싶지 않아요.
expressions.english: I don't want to talk about that problem.
expressions.notes:
문제 = problem; issue; thing; matter
-에 대해서 = about; regarding + N; concerning + N

expressions.korean: 화내지 않을 테니까 솔직히 말해 주세요.
expressions.english: I won't get angry, so just tell me honestly.
expressions.notes: 화내다 = to be angry at someone; to yell at someone out of anger

expressions.korean: 무슨 일이 있었는지 있는 그대로 말할게요.
expressions.english: I will tell you exactly what happened.
expressions.notes:
무슨 = what; what kind of
일 = work; task; thing; stuff; occasion
